title: Equal Three-Column Layout
description: Create 3 columns that share available space equally.

solution.css:
.three-col { display: flex; min-height: 200px; }
.three-col div { flex: 1; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #333; }

title: Sidebar + Main Layout
description: Create a layout where sidebar is 1 part and main content is 3 parts wide.

title: Mixed Fixed and Flexible
description: Create a layout with a fixed 200px sidebar, a flexible content area, and another fixed 150px sidebar.
